title: BRPL open tenders include vendor registration and power transformer procurement
summary: Public BSES BRPL tender page shows new vendor registration/revalidation and power transformer tender activity. This supports a demo focused on vendor discovery and transformer should-costing.

title: BSES tender center exposes open tenders, tender results, purchase orders and vendor registration navigation
summary: The public tender center navigation confirms that tender results, purchase orders and vendor registration are relevant procurement data objects for a control tower demo.

title: World Bank publishes monthly commodity price data and market commentary
summary: World Bank commodity markets data can provide a neutral macro benchmark for metal price movement and procurement timing recommendations.

title: LME official prices are global reference prices for physically delivered metals
summary: LME official prices can support indexed pricing clauses for aluminium, copper and zinc-heavy procurement contracts.

title: GST e-invoice portal generates IRN, digitally signed e-invoice and QR code
summary: The GST e-invoice workflow supports validation checks for invoice IRN, signed invoice and QR code status in a procurement audit workflow.
